author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 327a3ca. Splice path live for literal/CI-literal replaces (regex deliberately excluded — \s/[^x]/(?s) cross-line soundness); eligibility = no range, != first_per_line, no \n\r in find, uniform endings. Line-shaped Change metadata reconstructed per affected line via memchr; equivalence locked by proptest vs full-range-forced loop + 6 unit tests; context capped at first 1000 changes/file on all paths. MEASURED: 2.25s -> 1.54s (user CPU 0.70 -> 0.14s, now I/O-bound); sed measured 2.77s in the same run — ripsed is now FASTER than sed on the scenario it lost 6x this morning. 25 suites green incl. new proptest, clippy/fmt clean.
